pageContext.name: Mighty Thor
pageContext.description: A new version of the Jane Foster from 'Mighty Thor,' featuring 'new method' sculpting and Tamashii digital coloring for a lifelike appearance! In addition to a face so accurate we had to clear the portraiture rights with Natalie Portman, it includes a cracked Mjolnir hammer and numerous effect parts, plus a cape with internal wires for posability!  Add to your Marvel collection!
